name: Cranberry-Onion Chops
recipeInstructions:
1. In a large nonstick skillet, brown the pork chops on one side over medium-high heat.
2. In a medium bowl, stir together the remaining ingredients to mix well.
3. Turn the pork chops in the skillet and pour the cranberry mixture over them.
4. Bring to a boil, then lower the heat, cover, and simmer for 10 minutes, until the chops are just done and still tender.
5. Serve with rice or noodles, if desired.
